rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as moving from manual coding to scalable, automated content-feature extraction for media products, and the cited paper is a closely aligned prior work that introduces a scalable, theory-guided feature extraction method (guided LDA) for entertainment content and shows prediction gains. Given this strong methodological and topical overlap in feature construction for media-consumption prediction, this is plausibly more than an incidental background mention and should be examined in full.
